programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un capitán de la Marina es encontrado muerto con un disfraz inusual debajo de su uniforme, NCIS descubre una sociedad secreta de superhéroes reales y debe rastrear al villano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un reservista naval de alta seguridad es encontrado muerto. Gibbs colabora con la Dra. Samantha Ryan de PsyOps para descubrir la verdad detrás del posible suicidio. Mientras tanto, DiNozzo discute con contabilidad tras ver el salario de McGee.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Maldito
programme.desc: Cuando un mafioso local es asesinado a tiros en su auto, Danny y Báez intentan obtener información del chico de los recados de bajo nivel de la mafia que encuentran atado en el maletero antes de que la pandilla tome represalias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Viejos tiempos
programme.desc: Cuando el primer socio de Frank anuncia sus planes de publicar un libro lleno de historias de sus primeros días en la policía, a Frank le preocupa que sus historias personales se hagan públicas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A sangre fría
programme.desc: Cuando un teniente de la policía de Nueva York, recientemente retirado y bien considerado, es acusado de disparar a un grupo de posibles asaltantes en el metro y posteriormente desaparece, Frank debe enfrentar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El camino al infierno
programme.desc: Danny debe determinar quién asesinó a un hombre cuando varias mujeres que trabajaron para él se atribuyen el mérito.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras Hotch lucha por su vida debido a las complicaciones del apuñalamiento a manos de George Foyet, también conocido como "The Reaper", experimenta visiones de su difunta esposa, Haley, y su némesis, Foyet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga a las víctimas de posibles asesinatos rituales en Utah, las pistas los llevan a creer que el sujeto que buscan podría estar fascinado con los juicios de brujas de Salem.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un teniente comandante de la Armada mientras lidia con el esposo devastado. Mientras tanto, Ziva reevalúa su futuro cuando regresa Ray.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs se enfrenta a un arma durante una parada rutinaria para tomar café, lo que lo obliga a cuestionar decisiones pasadas y presentes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un capitán de la Marina es encontrado muerto con un disfraz inusual debajo de su uniforme, NCIS descubre una sociedad secreta de superhéroes reales y debe rastrear al villano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un reservista naval de alta seguridad es encontrado muerto. Gibbs colabora con la Dra. Samantha Ryan de PsyOps para descubrir la verdad detrás del posible suicidio. Mientras tanto, DiNozzo discute con contabilidad tras ver el salario de McGee.

programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a popular spiritual retreat when a body is found floating in a mud bath.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a ghost hunter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Russell and his team investigate a series of murders, one of their own confronts peril on a dangerous undercover mission to get close to the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: D.B. Russell leads the CSI team on a hunt to find Morgan and Ellie Brass following their kidnapping by a ritualistic killer, in the 14th season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate a murder and robbery at a poker game that had more than a million dollars in chips on the table.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a fire at a music venue that leaves four people dead, including two band members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When contestants on a reality cooking show accidentally eat human flesh during a competition, the CSI team is brought in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine Willows returns to help the CSIs solve a cold case that has haunted the team for 14 years, on the milestone 300th episode.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a homeless man who had a huge winning streak at a small casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a John Doe found during torrential rains in Vegas. Meanwhile, Greg Sanders is investigated and accused of framing a man for murder seven years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a man is found dead inside a human-sized hamster ball, the CSI team is brought in to investigate. Also, the team collaborates with a swing shift CSI on a case involving a serial rapist.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate the stabbing of a couple found at a local motel that is reminiscent of two incidents that occurred in the same room.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de una joven víctima disfrazada de súper héroe.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI está investigando una muerte en la que están implicados un Rolls-Royce antiguo y una víctima cubierta de cromo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI está investigando el asesinato de dos chicas adolescentes que fueron secuestradas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La unidad de CSI se enfrenta al último duelo con el asesino de Gig Harbor cuyos motivos son eventualmente revelados.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El destino de Sara sigue siendo una incógnita mientras el equipo de CSI se apresura a averiguar si ha sobrevivido al ataque del asesino en miniatura, en el estreno de la octava temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos inusuales. La muerte de un conductor de go-carts cuyo cuerpo decapitado se encuentra a metros de la carretera por la que corría, y el misterioso asesinato en un restaurante donde los clientes cenan en la oscuridad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de toda una familia, excepto el de una hija que supuestamente está poseída por el diablo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren a un joven estrangulado hasta morir ahorcado ...cuyo cuerpo parece el de una mujer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra entre bastidores en un estudio de cine porno de terror para investigar el asesinato de una actriz de cine slasher asesinada en el plató de una de sus películas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio is called to the Miami West Detention Center to investigate a murdered inmate, he ends up witnessing three inmates escape.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a young model is killed by a hit and run driver, Horatio investigates the car's owner, who claims he loaned it out to the guests at his party.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man harpooned to his yacht leads Horatio into the world of modern-day treasure hunting and the massive greed that goes along with it.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tennis phenom Lana Walker is taken from her bedroom in the night and the only evidence they have to go on is a purple fiber found in the window frame.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a former rape victim is beaten to within inches of her life, Horatio must enter the world of prisons and parolees to find the culprit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a robbery/homicide leaves two men dead and a third still alive, Horatio is determined to find out what really happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton is trying to drive out of the hurricane's fury when he kills a man in the blinding storm and is now accused of vehicular manslaughter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A gas man is engulfed in invisible flames and dies all of which happens during a qualifying race at the Grand Prix Americas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finally closes the case of his brother's murder. He is reunited with Suzie, a former drug user who was involved with his brother.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a woman is witnessed being attacked by a shark, the CSIs learn that she was murdered prior to being dumped in the water.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young woman is thrown over the railing of a parking garage, the investigation into her death uncovers evidence that she was killed before the fall.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a plastic surgery anesthesiologist is found dead from an apparent suicide, Horatio thinks that this could be a case of murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A diamond broker is shot to death in a parking garage, a mentally disabled man witnessed the murder and wants to help Horatio solve the crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man, Juan Marco Varon, who may or may not have tortured Cuban refuges is murdered, the CSIs are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio investiga un caso de venganza contra un ex-amante despreciado. Los problemas personales de un miembro de CSI manchan la investigación y Horatio se ve obligado a despedirlo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Después de que un presunto ladrón de autos es asesinado, los CSI se enteran de que la víctima puede haber estado involucrada en el contrabando de drogas frente a las costas de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Capturan a un asesino en serie sospechoso de matar a mujeres jóvenes y marcarlas con una "Y" y también lo identifican por tener el cromosoma "Y" adicional.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de un oficial de libertad condicional y Horatio se entera de que uno de los sospechosos puede ser un hijo que él no sabía que tenía.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el aparente asesinato de una universitaria, mientras que Delko tiene misteriosas visiones del difunto Tim Speedle.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Después de que Internet convierte a una alumna de secundaria en un símbolo sexual internacional, la información divulgada sobre Horatio pone su vida en peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI buscan exhaustivamente al hijo de Horatio después de que desaparece durante una sorprendente y mortal fuga de prisión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Asesinan a una leyenda del deporte y la investigación se complica cuando el laboratorio pierde el cuerpo. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Acontecimientos extraños empiezan a afectar al equipo de CSI mientras persiguen a un asesino en serie que atacó durante un eclipse total de sol.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una modelo se electrocuta en la pasarela, el caso lleva a Horatio y al equipo de CSI de vuelta al hijo de Horatio y a su archienemigo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando unas vacaciones familiares se vuelven mortales, el equipo de CSI debe encontrar al asesino antes de que los supervivientes hagan justicia por mano propia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un atentado contra la vida de Calleigh pone en peligro su vida personal y profesional. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El estilo de vida de los ricos y famosos está bajo el microscopio de Horatio y el equipo de CSI cuando la niñera de una familia adinerada aparece muerta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una ametralladora rara e ilegal evapora a tres contrabandistas de armas, el equipo de CSI debe encontrar al asesino antes de que el arma cause más muertes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Young brides-to-be fight over a killer dress at the biggest wedding gown sale of the year and one of the shoppers winds up dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: Cuando los hermanos se encuentran

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: Elefante blanco

programme.title: La última pelea

programme.title: Doble traición
programme.desc: Una semana antes de Navidad, y después de pasar seis años en prisión, un expresidiario se ve obligado a participar en un atraco al casino.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Allan Quatermain y la ciudad perdida del oro

programme.title: El ilusionista

programme.title: El monje

programme.title: Garras

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: Odessa Robbins is a civil rights hero in Sparta, and the town is planning a celebration of her life. Gillespie’s worries about old racial tensions resurfacing are sadly justified when the festivities are disrupted, putting Odessa’s life in danger.

programme.desc: While filling in for an advice columnist, Fran uses Mama's advice and becomes a hit. Since Mama has given Fran all her advice, Buzz insists Mama gets half of the profits, but Fran refuses.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Ellen stops by with a gift for Mama and to attempt to once again apologize for missing her Aunt Fran's funeral. Mama refuses to forgive her and throws her out. Later, the family learns that Ellen is in the hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de seis años corrió y se escondió cuando vio que su abuela era golpeada hasta causarle la muerte, pero el hombre la siguió, la golpeó y la agredió. Ella dijo que el agresor era su tío, quien fue condenado. Se retractó de su testimonio años después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este caso internacional de extorsión, asesinato e identidades robadas, el estafador Albert J. Walker asume la identidad del compañero de trabajo, Ronald Platt. Platt luego aparece muerto en un océano con un ancla atada alrededor de su torso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El pensamiento rápido de un investigador lo ayuda a capturar una huella de zapato hecha en la nieve antes de que la evidencia se desvanezca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 15 de Octubre de 1985, dos explosiones de bombas sacudieron a Salt Lake City y resultaron en dos muertes. Una tercera explosión ocurrió al día siguiente; esta vez, la víctima sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer fue identificado como el hombre que violó y estranguló a cinco jóvenes mujeres en Virginia. Con el uso de perfiles de ADN, se libera a un hombre inocente y se condena al verdadero asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, 121 personas en Dakota del Sur y Minnesota sufrieron una misteriosa enfermedad. Solo había habido un brote como ese, y cuando sucedió entonces, nadie pudo entender por qué.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, el cuerpo de la joven madre, Summer Baldwin, fue encontrado en una maleta en un vertedero de Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las primeras horas de la mañana, justo antes de Navidad, una estudiante universitaria fue secuestrada del estacionamiento de su departamento. Su cuerpo fue encontrado más tarde ese día. Ella había sido agredida sexualmente y fue disparada a quemarropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la década de los 90, los medios llamaron a Richard Rogers el "asesino de la última llamada" porque atacaba a hombres en bares gay que obviamente estaban intoxicados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un tiroteo desde un vehículo deja un hombre muerto y otro gravemente herido. Las llamadas de teléfonos celulares y los casquillos de bala apuntan a un sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Poco después del amanecer, se inicia un incendio en un contenedor de basura en Vancouver. Nadie ve al pirómano ni el fuego, que arde durante horas en el estacionamiento desolado. Pero hay más que basura en este contenedor en llamas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, un terrorista en serie apunta a un juez, dos abogados e incluso a una casa de la corte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, cuando un paciente muere inesperadamente en el consultorio del neurólogo de California, Richard Boggs, la policía comienza lo que creen que será una investigación de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Evidencia del Jefe
programme.desc: Se detalla el asesinato en Seattle de 1996 de la pareja suburbana Raquel Rivera y Jay Johnson. La evidencia del perro, Chief, de la pareja finalmente vincula a uno de los asesinos a la escena.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Huellas entre ladrones
programme.desc: El asesinato de un excéntrico millonario no fue del todo inesperado; alardeaba de su riqueza y se preocupaba poco por la seguridad personal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A cenar y ver una película
programme.desc: La hora de la muerte se vuelve fundamental después de que se encuentra asesinada a una mujer embarazada en su habitación con aire acondicionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asistente del gerente de una carnicería de Florida es apuñalado hasta la muerte. Parece ser un robo que salió mal, pero una huella sangrienta revela que él conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sin oraciones
programme.desc: La fundadora de American Atheists desapareció en 1995 junto con uno de sus hijos y su nieta, junto con 500,000 dólares en monedas de oro. La policía se centró en varios sospechosos, incluyendo a David R. Waters, que trabajaba para los Ateos Americanos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoë's trial begins and when she fears that she is being painted in a harsh light, she takes matters into her own hands. Becky is torn up about what she’s going to say when she takes the stand as a character witness in her brother’s trial.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The media is abuzz about Zoë’s trial. Feeling hopeless and worried about her tarnished reputation, Zoë is nervous as the verdict approaches. Becky is torn about what to say in her testimony, but deep down knows what she has to do.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Will a superstorm headed for Toronto stall a Degrassi dance? Maya, Zig & Zoë plan to attend but get stranded at the Matlin house.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare is forced to spend the night with Eli while in New York City. Maya and Zoë seek refuge in The Dot with nothing to do but sort out their rivalry. Drew searches for missing Becky. Miles and Tristan share a bonding moment during the storm.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare has a serious dilemma that will affect her entire future and confides in Alli and Jenna.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew's not taking the easy way out - he's going to be part of his child's life, whether Clare wants it or not.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frankie isn't a little girl anymore!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare has to muster up the courage to tell Eli about her situation.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky and her brother Luke’s relationship is very strained and even with her faith as strong as it is, she can't bring herself to forgive him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya can’t sleep. She’s having nightmares about Miles’ safety, and they’re becoming all too familiar.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoë receives texts from an unknown number, threatening that they know the people behind the Power Squad’s scandalous fundraising initiative.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tristan organizes an intervention for Miles, but it only pushes him further away.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is committed to keeping Becky happy but his situation with Clare has his attention divided.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mr. Simpson calls an assembly to address the offending fundraising website.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi's fundraising scandal threatens to ruin Frankie's relationship with her father.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mr. Hollingsworth’s campaign is in its final stretch, and the stress has him even more tense than usual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi is now in the hands of a new, strict Administrator which means new, strict rules.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Winston is set to play the lead in his musical but is not pleased that Lola could star opposite him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Frankie’s birthday, and she’s going to celebrate it, Hollingsworth style -- with a Gatsby party!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe is facing jail time following the fundraising scandal

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky has feelings for Jonah, but she isn't sure what to do with them.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya has someone on her mind, and is questioning the house rules Mrs. Matlin has set.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Prom is fast approaching, but Clare is MIA from committee meetings.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig is hesitant to let Maya see his new place.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig learns the truth behind some recent events, and now he’s an accomplice to a crime.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vince has taken Zig in and treated him like family, but his actions have put Zig, and now even Maya, in harm’s way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s prom time at Degrassi and in a last-minute shot to save his night, Drew plans an elaborate prom-posal.

programme.title: Good Eats

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The survivors of Earth lie in hibernation but the Doctor finds there has been an intruder.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The survivors of the human race start to awaken. But The Doctor is concerned...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Humankind faces total destruction. Can the Doctor defeat the Wirrn?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Trapped by the Wirrn, The Doctor and his friends are forced into one last terrible gamble.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Time Lords send the Doctor, Sarah and Harry to a time shortly before the creation of the Daleks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor finds that some of Davros's fellow Kaleds are unhappy with the development of the Daleks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor informs the Kaled government of Davros's experiments and they move to shut down the bunker.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: When the Kaled dome is destroyed, the war appears to be over and the Thals rejoice at their victory.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Davros interrogates the Doctor, forcing him to reveal the future of the Daleks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Kaled elite move to prevent the development of the Daleks while the Doctor hopes to destroy them forever.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: While on holiday in Paris, the Doctor and Romana experience a time distortion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Scarlioni is planning to steal the Mona Lisa. Yet he has six in his cellar - all genuine.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Count Scarlioni is really Scaroth, last of the Jagaroth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Scaroth intends to travel back in time to save his own people from destruction.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Meglos plans to steal the ancient and powerful Dodecahedron from Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Posing as the Doctor, Meglos penetrates the underground city of Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Meglos escapes with the Dodecahedron and the Doctor is mistakenly held responsible.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor must prevent Meglos from using the dodecahedron to destroy Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: With the TARDIS disabled, the Doctor is powerless to act when Romana is kidnapped.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to repair the TARDIS so that he can come to Romana's rescue.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana suspect that the Nimon are a small part of a large invasion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: On Crinoth, Romana discovers the truth behind the Nimon's empty promises.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana visit the Leisure Hive, a tourist attraction on the planet Argolis.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana track down the cause of the mysterious deaths at the Leisure Hive.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Tachyon Recreation Generator ages the Doctor into a white haired old man.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The obsessed Pangol is determined to give Argolis a future and strike back at the Foamasi.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Arriving on Earth, the Doctor, Harry and Sarah meet a group of stranded human colonists.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah has been captured by Styre who is conducting experiments on the captured humans.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive sheepdog/collie mix needs extra attention, so Cesar brings him to the Dog Psychology Center; a St. Bernard with a fear of stairs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Great Dane behaves aggressively toward strange dogs; a Lhasa apso eats everything she can get her paws on.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Chihuahua mix with aggression issues; a Pomeranian with severe separation anxiety; an Aussie/shar pei mix who runs away when his owner coughs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two wolf hybrids with aggression issues; an aggressive Chihuahua.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A basset hound is afraid of her owner's husband; a blue heeler mix with unique bedtime rituals.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A vicious Chihuahua frightens the pit bulls at the rescue center where he lives.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Wheaten terrier puppy bites when playing; a Jack Russell terrier jumps when the garbage disposal runs and lunges at the dishwasher; a Lab fears shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar teams up with horse whisperer Pat Parelli to improve the behavior of the dogs and horses at a riding center; a schnauzer/poodle mix with separation anxiety and dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Old and new cases that show the process for adopting a dog, introducing one to the home, setting rules and boundaries and dealing with the loss of a pet.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward people and dogs; a dachshund mix exhibits aggression at feeding time and when it comes time to trim his nails.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan investigates the case of a bulldog named Bella who has become aggressive ever since her owner's five-month rehab stint.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A professional dog groomer reaches out to Cesar for help with three of her toughest clients; Cesar helps a couple with their head-strong pitbull.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar attempts to introduce Roscoe, an agoraphobic Akita who is too scared to leave the house and garden and has never been for a walk, to the outside world.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Weimaraner eats everything in sight; a yellow Lab's excess energy is expressed destructively; an Australian shepherd is unable to socialize with other dogs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam, and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address, they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: When Blake learns Steven's attorney Chris has moved in with his son, he vows to fight for custody of little Danny. Morgan Hess, Alexis' private investigator, asks his employer for a large sum of money to pay off a gambling debt.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis, trapped in a burning cabin far off in the woods, find the door has been locked--from the outside. Mark, who has come to see Krystle in this remote setting, dramatically rescues the two women, who are rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Mark is charged with attempted murder and arson; Alexis tells Blake and the police his motive was revenge. The other suspects-McVane, Hess and Adam, are questioned and released.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis receives a note from the late Joseph--he set the fire with the intention of killing her; Claudia is released from the sanitarium; Steven and Blake fight over little Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby physically attacks Alexis, demanding to know the reason Joseph wanted her dead; at the trial for custody of little Danny, Alexis testifies against Blake, who erupts in anger.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the custody trial continues, Fallon testifies on her brother's behalf while Sammy Jo defames her ex-husband. Fallon leaves for Montana to investigate Adam's past; Claudia hits on the scheme for Steven to retain custody of his son.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven and Claudia marry, and the judge dismisses the custody suit; Blake offers Krystle a public relations job; Adam tricks Alexis into signing blank documents; Fallon and Jeff uncover evidence suggesting Adam may have poisoned Jeff.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam frames Alexis for the poisoning incident, and Blake threatens to take the story public; Mark attacks Krystle; Denver-Carrington's publicist Tracy is disappointed that Krystle has been appointed department head.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff accuses Alexis of attempting to murder him and reclaims his stock; Mark is hired as Alexis' bodyguard; Dex Dexter, the son of a board member, proposes he and Alexis form a business alliance.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex continues his efforts to win Alexis; Jeff learns Adam raped Kirby; Krystle relishes her own publicity post; Fallon meets a dashing millionaire at the track.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex beats Alexis to an oil contract; Jeff confronts Adam about Kirby's pregnancy; Krystle accepts Blake's marriage proposal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex beats Alexis to an oil contract; Jeff confronts Adam about Kirby's pregnancy; Krystle accepts Blake's marriage proposal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam proposes marriage to Kirby, who intends to divorce Jeff; Tracy persuades Krystle to give her the company credit cards and confidential files; Peter makes a pass at Claudia; Krystle and Blake are remarried.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A stranger greets little Danny by name; worried, Claudia moves the family into the mansion; Peter DeVilbis' architect hints at the playboy's drug problem; Kirby's hand swells uncontrollably.

programme.desc: Mae preaches beautifully at A Day With Lady Mae as the Bishop fears he may lose Calvary; Grace gets a paternity test with Aaron and works with Jacob to clear their family name.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: After the success of her big day, Lady Mae is denied the right to run Calvary despite support from the Bishop; Grace takes over thanks to Connie and joins Harmony & Hope Ministries.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: On the first Sunday after Harmony and Hope's installation at Calvary, the Greenleaf family's united front shatters; Grace attempts to lead the church's loyalties back toward the Greenleafs, but a call from Noah brings a long buried secret to light.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: While engaging in a power struggle with Phil, Grace walks a tightrope, uncertain of what to do in regards to her secret; Bishop discovers something about a rival, making it possible to win back Mae and the church.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: While facing her past, Grace gives Phil the opportunity to impress key church leadership; Lady Mae steps in to do damage control in Grace's absence, and she is forced to face Mac's ghost and her own stained reputation.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Bob Whitmore returns to Memphis, Tenn., to remind Grace that he is the one in charge and to encourage her to consider a new idea he has for Calvary; on a mission to uncover what's been going on between Noah and Grace, Charity makes a phone call.

programme.title: Power

programme.title: Power

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost, Tommy and Kanan move forward with their task to kill the heads of the Jimenez Cartel; Donovan warns Angela that her own office is after her; LaKeisha lets slip that Teresi is Tommy's father.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help a heartless used car salesman reconsider his actions on Christmas Eve.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark investigate a gang of drug smugglers after an old friend of Mark's has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme is Lyon Gaultier, a deserter in the French Foreign Legion who travels to the USA and enters the gory world of bare-knuckled street fighting in order to make money to save his brother's life and family.

programme.title: Double Impact
programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: Bloodsport
programme.desc: Ninjitsu master Frank Dux journeys to Hong Kong to enter the Kumite, the Olympics of martial arts, and meets a beautiful American reporter. Before long he must face Chong-Li, a vicious Korean master of Tae Kwan Do, in a climactic fight to the finish.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Maine resident Pearl Smith goes missing after an argument with her husband, Bill Bruns. When investigators find a blood trail that leads to the couple's basement, police are sure they'll find the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred and Ethel overhear a fight between Ricky and Lucy...or did they? It seems Lucy is reading a murder mystery out loud to the amusement of Ricky. But when Ricky playfully throws the book at Lucy, she ends up with a black eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are out a restaurant and Lucy keeps changing her order and their seating. Ricky points out that she constantly changes her mind and never completes things.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' infant is cranky and keeps his parents as well as their neighbors up at night. When a neighbor, Mrs. Trumbull points out that the lease forbids children and threatens to move out along with other tenants.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are exhausted from walking the baby at night and hire a maid. Lucy prepares a list of dos and don'ts in order to set down the law for her new employee. However when Mrs. Porter arrives, she has her own list for her employer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to get into the act when Ricky is producing an Indian show at the Tropicana. Ricky instead hires the Mertzes to be part of the show, hoping Lucy will be cured of her show biz bug now that she is a mother.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky has planned a surprise party for Lucy's birthday and swears the Mertzes and all their friends to secrecy. Lucy, however, only knows that everyone has forgotten her birthday.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Without consulting Ricky, Lucy buys new living room furniture, using their old set as a down payment. Waiting for the right moment to tell Ricky the news, she hides the new furniture in the kitchen.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: By order of the Phoenix, King Laval, Cragger, Eris and their friends must defend a mysterious hill against the Hunter Tribes. They discover that the hill is strangely immune to the Hunters’ Ice Powers.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: When the Tribes of Chima, armed with ample Fire Chi, launch a furious counter-assault against the Hunters, Fangar and his cohorts disappear underground.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Our heroes continue pushing back the Hunters with their Fire Chi-powered vehicles, but when they search the sites of the Hunters’ attacks, they can’t find any of the defeated animals. What has happened to them?

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Fearing for the fate of the Candy Realm, the dream chasers evacuate its inhabitants while Mateo and Astrid infiltrate the Midnight Raven.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When the Never Witch sets her sights on the Grim Realm, the dream chasers must team up with the Nightmare King and Grimspawn to stop her.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The team find the Crown of Control quite easily when they meet the King of the Creatures, but they realise that extracting it back to Brooklyn is much harder.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: While Izzie faces off against the King of the Creatures in the dream world, the dream chasers keep Izzie's disappearance a secret in the waking world.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: The Mayor and Carol work late when all manner of strange events begin to happen. Extreme Sports host, Dynamo, holds a competition to see who will go on the City Mars mission.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Firefighter Buster Lloyd gets the opportunity to live out his fantasy of being a police officer. Sanitation worker, Shirley Keeper, educates local residents on how to take care of their City.

programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all ... in the form of the T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin The 3rd "The Secret Of Mamo"
programme.desc: The world's most wanted master thief, Lupin III is dead! Despite a coroner's report, Interpol Inspector Zenigata is skeptical and discovers that Lupin is actually alive and well and stealing! But who had set up Lupin's death and why?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: The Hida Speedway has been completed and Lupin is looking to take top prize at the first race. The race is actually a trap designed by the Scorpion Gang who are intent on killing Lupin and eliminating all criminal competition.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko has stolen something from a man named Pycal, and he wants it back. Pycal is a magician who is able to shoot flames from his hands, walk on air, and deflect bullets with ease. Lupin goes up against Pycal in hopes of saving Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A boat collision ruins Lupin and Fujiko's quiet boating expedition. They discover a woman named Linda in the other boat just as gunmen on a larger boat attack them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko successfully pull off a heist; that is until Zenigata manages to shoot Lupin with a tranquilizer dart. Zenigata hauls Lupin off to jail. Despite Fujiko's best efforts, she cannot break Lupin out of prison.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of some quick gunplay by his partner Jigen, Lupin takes on the world in elaborate heists, classic car chases, and nasty explosions. Fujiko, a buxom redhead with a penchant for betrayal, always gets tangled up in Lupin's capers.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: One rainy afternoon, a man seeks Lupin's help on behalf of a young woman. The woman is actually Fujiko, who is after a diamond known as "The Star of Killamanjaro". The diamond was implanted into the chest of a mob boss.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Three scrolls contain the secret of creating a blade like the Zantetsuken. Lupin wants to steal them as a matter of family pride because his grandfather, Arsene Lupin, stole them back in the 19th century.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Napoleon once owned a deck of fortune-telling cards that are now in the hands of a millionaire known as Mr. Gold. Lupin plans to steal them during Mr. Gold's birthday party, and Zenigata plans to stop him. Lupin succeeds in stealing the mysterious cards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang aim to steal the blueprints for a new computer. In their way is a man skilled with the machinegun and his hit-man partner named Poon, who used to be Fujiko's partner in the past.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is posing as Lupin and blowing up bridges, causing a lot of damage and injuries. Lupin and Jigen discover that the bomber is trying to force an armored car to travel along a route of his choosing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Mamo Kyosuke claims that Lupin will disappear from the world in four days. He claims that he is a time traveler from 2874 seeking revenge. Apparently, Lupin XIII destroyed the Mamo clan on March 2874.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are both after the legendary Eye of the Nile emerald. It is going to be a wedding gift presented at a wedding being held on a yacht.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Zenigata has been invited to an international police convention in Europe; his chief wants him to go, but Zenigata does not want to since Lupin has declared that he will steal a gold bust within the next three days.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko goads Lupin into stealing a large shipment of diamonds. Lupin takes the task despite Jigen's protest that Fujiko is playing them for fools. Of course, Jigen is right.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko invites Lupin and the gang to a famous nightclub owned by the sexy Hoshikage Rinko. Only Goemon refuses. This was a wise move as Rinko places timebombs on Fujiko, Jigen, and Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Smith is an art thief that is selling stolen paintings under the guise of a beauty contest. Lupin decides he wants in on the action as well, promising to steal away the treasured paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Inspector Ganimard III is the grandson of Lupin I's archnemesis. He has come to Japan as the head of security for the 1972 France Fair but also intends to restore his family's honor by arresting Lupin III.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is committing thefts under Lupin's name. Lupin follows the imposters back to their island hideout. He has apparently stumbled into a whole island of thieves.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Rie is being held captive though she does not realize it. She believes the man holding her is a friend of her father, Ken Makita. Lupin shows up to rescue her.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A disappearing diary, a missing mistress and a preposterous police report pose problems for Matlock when he agrees to defend a psychiatrist, Lucas Forbes.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Matlock
